raw_comment:
I noticed:
the western side for example California, grows greens fast then the northern side. The south also grows greens faster.
I wonder:
Why do some parts of the U.S.A greens grow faster then the others. Is it weather or sunlight
Another wonder is what would the map look like in the past. For example in the 1970s?
